name: Abroad Matrimony — Local

values.description: Populated automatically by Verify OTP or Trusted Device Login test scripts
Populated automatically by Admin Login test script
Conversation UUID — copy from List Conversations response
Message UUID — copy from Get Messages response
User UUID — copy from Verify OTP response
Flag UUID — copy from List Flags response

description:
Local development environment for Abroad Matrimony API.

How to use:
1. Import this file: Environments → Import
2. Select 'Abroad Matrimony — Local' as the active environment
3. Run Admin Login to populate admin_token
4. Run Request OTP → Verify OTP to populate access_token
5. Copy UUIDs from responses into conv_id, msg_id, user_id, flag_id as needed
